name: Hare 136
short_description: Drag adorable coin-riding rabbits and slide them across the board. Solve engaging cozy puzzles. Help our little fluffy friends get back to their home!
detailed_description:
No matter if rabbit or hare, it's always puzzling!

After enjoying a whole day playing outside, it's time to go home. And there's no time to waste, be clever and try to do it in the minimum number of moves!

Hare 136 is a simple and relaxing but increasingly challenging sliding puzzle game where you find the best path to move rabbits across the board. You can choose between the two available game modes: "Slider" where you try to get one of the rabbits back into their den, and "Sower" where you try to get the rabbits go through every tile to seed the whole map.

Key features:

  • Two game modes: Choose between Slider and Sower, where you use the sliding mechanic to reach different goals.

  • 136 unique levels for each mode: Those are 272 unique levels in total!

  • Daily puzzle mode: If 272 levels weren't enough, you can come back tomorrow to get a completely new random level.

  • Cute hand-drawn artstyle: The rabbits are cute and fluffy, so are the puzzles.

  • An amazing soundtrack: If you ever wondered how rabbits and puzzles sound, this is how.

  • Steam achievements: A digital trophy for all the puzzles you are able to solve.

Slide rabbits, Solve Puzzles!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
